name: ollama-swarm
description: Local multi-agent swarm system (Ollama + other providers) with Brain-as-OS for analyzing and editing codebases.

scripts.build: npm -w server run build && npm -w web run build
scripts.test: npm -w shared run test && npm -w server run test
scripts.typecheck: npm -w shared run typecheck && npm -w server run typecheck && npm -w web run typecheck
